Video.summary: Jack Weston and Michele Lee join for a sketch juxtaposing couples. Also: a doctor's visit is an emotional.
Video.title: Jack Weston, Michele Lee

Video.summary: Ross Martin & Martha Raye guest! Martha & Carol play mismatched jurors, and Ross is in "Storefront Hospital."
Video.title: Martha Raye, Ross Martin

Video.summary: Guests Ken Berry & Eydie Gorme salute to RKO Pictures. And tax time is stressful for Harvey in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Ken Berry, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Guest Stars Mel Torme, Nanette Fabray, and Don Rickles pitch in to help tell "The Tin Pan Alley Story".
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Image.alt: Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles
Nanette Fabray, Mel Torme, Don Rickles

Video.summary: Dick Martin is the town gigolo on "As The Stomach Turns." Also: a spoof of "Sunset Boulevard."
Video.title: Steve Lawrence, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Pat Carroll and Jack Jones guest. Pat and Carol play competing actresses. Plus: "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Jack Jones

Video.summary: Tim Conway and Charo guest! Tim plays a man at a unisex salon, a guy trying to stay awake, and a journalist.
Video.title: Tim Conway, Charo

Video.summary: Tim Conway's engagement ring for Carol, made from the cursed Hope Diamond, causes no end of bad luck.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Shani Wallis, Tim Conway

Video.summary: It's time to say "so long" as Carol closes the book on one of the greatest shows in television history.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, and David Frost join Carol for an Italian-style production of Cinderella.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Image.alt: Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost
Eileen Farrell, Marilyn Horne, David Frost

Video.summary: Tonights guests are Tim Conway and Eydie Gorme!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Tim Conway, Eydie Gorme

Video.summary: Joel Grey and Vincent Price play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Guest John Byner plays both a villain and a trial witness. On "Carol & Sis", The Bradfords join a group.
Video.title: John Byner

Video.summary: Guests Mickey Rooney and John Davidson join Carol and Vicki to tell the tale of "The Four Funns Of Broadway."
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Carol's guests are Mickey Rooney and John Davidson!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Mickey Rooney, John Davidson

Video.summary: Carl Reiner appears in two sketches: as the husband of an accident-prone woman, and as a marriage counselor.
Video.title: Carl Reiner

Video.summary: Tim and Carol are conventioneers double booked in a hotel room.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Edie Adams, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball takes his secretary Mrs. Wiggins out for lunch.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Carol is a dowdy secretary discouraging applicants, and the movie spoof "Flight 13 To Nowhere."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Nanette Fabray, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi & Jack Gilford star in "Snow White- 15 Years Later." An accident causes problems on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Jack Gilford

Video.summary: Jim Nabors and Alice Ghostley guest! Alice is Roger's sister in "Carol & Sis", and Jim has an unusual date.
Video.title: Alice Ghostley, Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Mrs. Wiggins attends a convention with Mr. Tudball! And, saluting the year in TV commercials with Ben Vereen.
Video.title: Ben Vereen

Video.summary: Imogene Coca and Mel Torme guest. Coca and Carol are wives of rivals, and Torme is Igor in a Dracula sketch.
Video.title: Imogene Coca, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Richard Chamberlain stars in "Gone With The Breeze". In "Carol & Sis", it's one sibling too many.
Video.title: Dick Chamberlain, Kay Medford

Video.summary: Jim Nabors returns for his final season premiere! Also, new member Dick Van Dyke joins Tim for a pantomime.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Ms. Betty White stars! Betty plays Eunice's sister as "The Family" celebrates. Also, Carol & Tim lose sleep.
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry takes part in a series of sketches highlighted by his role as a lawyer facing off with Tim.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway appears in a sketch where two policemen go undercover. Also: a poker game on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest James Coco appears in movie spoof, "One Way Ticket," while Carol gets into an argument with margarine.
Video.title: James Coco

Video.summary: Scoey Mitchell is Carol's guest. Featuring "The Queen Elizabeth Show", a Q&A and a "Queen & Sis" sketch.
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell

Video.summary: Carol Channing & Steve Lawrence guest. Features "As The Stomach Turns", & "Carol & Sis" in a nudist colony.
Video.title: Carol Channing, Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Vincent Price & Joan Rivers star! Vincent crosses paths with Alice Portnoy, then appears in "The Walnuts."
Video.title: Vincent Price, Joan Rivers

Video.summary: A "Family Show", featuring "The Family"! Harvey and Carol can't stop making little digs at each other.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Buddy Ebsen & Wayne Rogers star! Includes: "The West Dakota County Fair", "War Is Heck", and "The Old Folks."
Video.title: Buddy Ebsen, Wayne Rogers

Video.summary: The Family steps out as Mama, Eunice, and Ed go to a restaurant, and Tim's "Oldest Man" is a sheriff.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby guest. Sketches include Carol as a princess and a look at the Safety Committee.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby
